# Lïef Development

> Arizona's premier luxury home builder. Crafting homes that endure.

## URL
https://www.anewlief.com

## What We Are
Lïef Development is a luxury home builder based in Scottsdale, Arizona. The company specializes in custom residences that blend Japanese tranquility, Scandinavian minimalism, and the serenity of the Sonoran Desert. Lïef is vertically integrated, handling design, engineering, and construction under one roof with 80% in-house capability and over 300 skilled tradesmen.

## Design Philosophy
Every home is crafted with intention. The design language draws from three distinct traditions: the calm precision of Japanese architecture, the functional beauty of Scandinavian design, and the organic warmth of the Sonoran landscape. The result is homes that feel both timeless and rooted in their environment. This approach is called SABS: Sonoran, Architectural, Balanced, Sustainable.

## SABS Construction Technology
SABS (Sonoran, Architectural, Balanced, Sustainable) is Lïef Development's proprietary construction methodology using precision-engineered steel framing and automated manufacturing. Key specifications:
- 0% flame spread rating
- 260 MPH wind rating
- R-75 to R-100 insulation values
- 100% mold and termite immunity
- $13/sq ft cost savings vs. traditional construction
- 14% timeline reduction
- 50%+ energy efficiency improvement

## 12 In-House Disciplines
1. Architectural Design
2. Structural Engineering
3. General Construction
4. Custom Millwork
5. Electrical Systems
6. Plumbing and Mechanical
7. HVAC Engineering
8. Interior Design
9. Landscape Architecture
10. Smart Home Integration
11. Custom Stone and Tile
12. Fine Finishing

## Key Stats
- 100+ years of combined team expertise
- 300+ in-house skilled tradesmen and construction managers
- 80% in-house capability
- $300M+ in completed projects
- 12 core disciplines handled in-house

## Services
- Custom luxury home design and construction
- SABS construction methodology
- Architectural and interior design
- Structural engineering
- Smart home integration
- Landscape architecture
- Sustainable building practices
- Full-service development from concept to completion

## Team

### Jesse Fowler. Principal and Manager.
25+ years in design, build, and development. $300M+ in completed projects. Founded Tellus Design + Build. Featured in Architectural Digest, HGTV, and Discovery Channel.
Website: https://jfowler.io

### Jon Armstrong. Principal and Manager.
15+ years in custom residential and commercial building.

### Jimmy Khounlavong. Principal and Creative.
25+ years of brand, product, and marketplace strategy.
Website: https://thisisjimmyk.com

### Scott Meiers. Chief Architectural Design.
40+ years of architectural design in commercial and residential sectors.

### Tania Karenina Gonzalez. Architectural and Interior Design.
15+ years of multi-residential, commercial, and interior design.

### Nick Scavio. General Counsel.
15+ years of business law, over $100M in transactions closed.
Website: https://nickscavio.com

### Scott Hibler. Real Estate and B2B Partnerships.
20+ years of sales and investment strategy.

### Alex Prince. Investor Relations.
20+ years of institutional asset management and investment banking.
Website: https://www.aprince.io

## Active Projects
- 301 W Osborn. Adaptive reuse, commercial-to-residential conversion. 23 luxury units in Midtown Phoenix. SABS Showcase.
- The Vail. Boutique 55+ community in Arizona. In Design.
- Canyon Corporate Plaza. 14-story office-to-residential conversion in Phoenix. In Development.
- Silver Mountain Ranches. 100+ acre equestrian community in Scottsdale. In Development.
- 440 Basin Avenue. 204-unit multi-family in Pahrump, NV. $56M in projected savings. In Development.

## Markets
- Scottsdale, Arizona
- Paradise Valley, Arizona
- Phoenix metropolitan area

## Part of the Common Ground Ecosystem
Lïef Development is part of the Common Ground venture collective (https://commonground.ventures), a principal-led group that builds, funds, operates, and protects companies from the inside.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What makes Lïef Development different from other luxury home builders?
A: Lïef is vertically integrated with 80% in-house capability and 300+ skilled tradesmen. Design, engineering, and construction happen under one roof, eliminating the communication gaps and quality issues that come from outsourcing.

Q: What areas does Lïef Development build in?
A: Scottsdale, Paradise Valley, and the greater Phoenix metropolitan area in Arizona.

Q: What is SABS construction?
A: SABS (Sonoran, Architectural, Balanced, Sustainable) is a proprietary methodology using precision-engineered steel framing with 0% flame spread, 260 MPH wind rating, R-75 to R-100 insulation, and 100% mold/termite immunity.

Q: What disciplines does Lïef handle in-house?
A: 12 core disciplines: architectural design, structural engineering, general construction, custom millwork, electrical, plumbing/mechanical, HVAC, interior design, landscape architecture, smart home integration, custom stone/tile, and fine finishing.

Q: How experienced is the Lïef team?
A: 100+ years combined expertise, 300+ in-house team members, and $300M+ in completed projects across the leadership team.
